title: Add Heia - Polly Intelligence update to chat
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Polly speaks your language
gist.blurb: The community just dropped 'Heia', a new chat app featuring a Polly Intelligence update that automatically translates to your browser's language. The hive mind is going global!
gist.summary: Added the 'Heia - Polly Intelligence update' community app to the showcase, which includes automatic browser language translation.
gist.impact: Users can now explore this new community chat app that seamlessly adapts to their native language.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee getting an 'intelligence update' and learning languages. Depict Polly wearing smart glasses, surrounded by floating chat bubbles with different symbols, while the Monitor Robot helps her study.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny smart glasses, surrounded by floating chat bubbles. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head holds a glowing dictionary, screen glowing lime green (#ecf874). Soft pastel lavender and peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny smart glasses, surrounded by floating chat bubbles. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head holds a glowing dictionary, screen glowing lime green (#ecf874). Soft pastel lavender and peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
